title: INF-9 Subquadratic full-feature-parity integration test
goal: End-to-end integration test exercising ALL 5 feature_parity_detail items per operator E-2: load+generate, LoRA mount, activation steering, prefix-reuse-equivalent (state-vector caching), cross-session state restore. Per-family env-gated.
expected_diff_shape: New src/backend/handshake_core/tests/inf9_subquadratic_full_parity_smoke.rs orchestrating all 5 features on Mamba2 + RWKV v5/v6/v7.
implementation_notes: Per operator E-2 acceptance of FULL FEATURE PARITY scope. Per architecture (Mamba2, RWKV v5, v6, v7) test scenario: (1) load model; (2) generate 32 tokens baseline; (3) mount fixture LoRA, generate, assert output differs; (4) capture activations + register zero steering vector + generate (identity test); (5) register random steering vector + generate (output differs); (6) state-vector commit, generate, restore, generate same continuation (deterministic); (7) persist state to disk, simulate process restart, load_from_disk, generate continuation (deterministic across restart); (8) unload. Env-gated per architecture; if any architecture env var absent, skip that architecture's sub-test with explicit log message. FR event family coverage asserted per family (FR-EVT-LLM-INFER-SUBQUAD-*). This gate is the operator's visible signal that INF-9 has reached the agreed full-parity ship bar.
risk_if_missed: Operator E-2 FULL FEATURE PARITY acceptance not gated; partial-parity ship could be mistaken for PRODUCTION.
validator_focus: All 5 feature_parity_detail items covered per architecture; per-architecture skip; FR event family coverage.

minimum_controls: All 5 feature_parity_detail items present per architecture (no commented-out steps).
Per-architecture skip path on missing env var.
